items.title_en: Jury selection kicks off in Musk v. Altman trial
items.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼案审判陪审团遴选开始
items.desc_en: The Musk v. Altman trial kicked off at a federal courthouse in Oakland, California, with jury selection followed by opening arguments.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼案的审判在加利福尼亚州奥克兰的联邦法院开始，首先选择陪审团，然后进行开场陈词。

items.title_en: Pharma bets a little-known form of cholesterol will underpin its next blockbuster heart drugs
items.title_zh: 制药公司押注一种鲜为人知的胆固醇将成为其下一款重磅心脏病药物的基础
items.desc_en: Novartis, Amgen and Eli Lilly are betting that slashing levels of a particularly bad form of cholesterol could deliver the next blockbusters in cardiology.
items.desc_zh: 诺华 (Novartis)、安进 (Amgen) 和礼来 (Eli Lilly) 押注，降低一种特别有害的胆固醇水平可能会带来心脏病学领域的下一个重磅炸弹。

items.title_en: Iran War News Live Updates: Iran Wants Deal to Lift Hormuz Blockade That Postpones Nuclear Talks - WSJ
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争新闻实时更新：伊朗希望达成协议以解除推迟核谈判的霍尔木兹封锁 - 华尔街日报
items.desc_en: Iran War News Live Updates: Iran Wants Deal to Lift Hormuz Blockade That Postpones Nuclear Talks  WSJIran reportedly proposes Hormuz Strait deal to U.S. Here’s where things stand — and what’s next for
items.desc_zh: 伊朗战争新闻实时更新：伊朗希望达成解除霍尔木兹封锁的协议，从而推迟核谈判 据报道，WSJIran 向美国提议达成霍尔木兹海峡协议。情况如下 - 以及下一步

items.title_en: Trump ballroom lawsuit plaintiff rejects DOJ demand to drop case after 'assassination attempt'
items.title_zh: 特朗普舞厅诉讼原告拒绝司法部在“暗杀企图”后撤销案件的要求
items.desc_en: Trump and others say the proposed White House ballroom would be much more secure than the Washington Hilton Hotel, where Saturday's shooting occurred.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普和其他人表示，拟议中的白宫宴会厅将比周六发生枪击事件的华盛顿希尔顿酒店安全得多。

items.title_en: Ray Dalio says Kevin Warsh shouldn't cut interest rates in a ‘stagflation’ era
items.title_zh: 雷·达里奥表示凯文·沃什不应在“滞胀”时代降息
items.desc_en: Dalio said that if Kevin Warsh were to cut rates, it would risk damaging confidence in the central bank at a critical moment.
items.desc_zh: 达里奥表示，如果凯文·沃什（Kevin Warsh）降息，可能会在关键时刻损害人们对央行的信心。

items.title_en: Nvidia, Intel call buyers defy the dip in chip stocks
items.title_zh: 英伟达、英特尔称买家无视芯片股下跌
items.desc_en: One of the biggest trades in the group this morning is a $2.2 million purchase of 2,168 $210-strike calls in Nvidia that expire May 15.
items.desc_zh: 今天上午该集团最大的交易之一是以 220 万美元购买了 Nvidia 的 2,168 个行使价为 210 美元的看涨期权，该看涨期权将于 5 月 15 日到期。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Sandisk, Micron, Verizon, AMD, GE Vernova and more
items.title_zh: 中午涨幅最大的股票：Sandisk、Micron、Verizon、AMD、GE Vernova 等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些是午盘交易中涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Trump is betting the blockade will break the Iran regime. Why that could backfire
items.title_zh: 特朗普押注封锁将打破伊朗政权。为什么这会适得其反
items.desc_en: Wolfe Research warns that the blockade will lengthen the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, and that it could force Iran to eventually retaliate violently.
items.desc_zh: 沃尔夫研究公司警告称，封锁将延长霍尔木兹海峡的关闭时间，并可能迫使伊朗最终采取暴力报复。

items.title_en: Domino's Pizza stock falls on disappointing sales — and CEO thinks more chains will follow
items.title_zh: 达美乐比萨股价因销售令人失望而下跌——首席执行官认为更多连锁店将效仿
items.desc_en: CEO Russell Weiner said he expects more fast-food chains will report that winter weather and weak consumer sentiment hurt their quarterly sales.
items.desc_zh: 首席执行官拉塞尔·韦纳(Russell Weiner)表示，他预计更多的快餐连锁店将报告冬季天气和疲软的消费者信心损害了他们的季度销售额。

items.title_en: French coastguard rescues more than 100 migrants crossing Channel
items.title_zh: 法国海岸警卫队营救100多名穿越英吉利海峡的移民
items.desc_en: A boat carrying 106 people broke down at sea, while others were rescued attempting to board the vessel.
items.desc_zh: 一艘载有106人的船在海上抛锚，其他人在试图登船时获救。

items.title_en: Investors usually 'sell in May and go away.' Why that may not work this year
items.title_zh: 投资者通常会“在五月份卖出然后离开”。为什么今年可能行不通
items.desc_en: The maxim may not hold up this year, as a stock market at all-time highs exhibits signs of further momentum.
items.desc_zh: 今年，这句格言可能不再适用，因为处于历史高位的股市显示出进一步上涨势头的迹象。

items.desc_en: The Trump administration has repeatedly insisted that the central goal of the conflict is keeping Iran from ever obtaining a nuclear weapon.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普政府一再坚称，冲突的核心目标是阻止伊朗获得核武器。

items.title_en: Pakistan accused of attacking Afghan university
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦被指控袭击阿富汗大学
items.desc_en: Air attacks on the province of Kunar have killed at least seven people and injured 75, sources tell the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 消息人士告诉 BBC，库纳尔省的空袭已造成至少 7 人死亡、75 人受伤。

items.title_zh: 枪手袭击尼日利亚孤儿院并绑架儿童
items.desc_en: The attack saw 23 children and the facility's proprietress kidnapped by gunmen on Sunday.
items.desc_zh: 周日的袭击中，23 名儿童和该设施的老板娘被枪手绑架。

items.title_zh: 南苏丹客机失事 机上14人全部遇难

items.desc_zh: 当局正在调查，但早期报告表明恶劣天气和能见度差可能是罪魁祸首。

items.title_zh: 科尔·艾伦 (Cole Allen) 因 WHCD 枪击案接受法庭传讯
items.desc_en: The Secret Service is facing scrutiny over security at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, where President Donald Trump was evacuated Saturday.

items.title_en: Prediction markets prepare to invade one of crypto’s biggest and riskiest trades
items.title_zh: 预测市场准备入侵加密货币最大、风险最高的交易之一
items.desc_en: There’s a landgrab underway in the U.S. for perpetual futures, one of the biggest and riskiest parts of crypto — and prediction markets want a piece of it.
items.desc_zh: 美国正在争夺永续期货的土地，这是加密货币中规模最大、风险最高的部分之一，而预测市场也想从中分一杯羹。

items.title_zh: OpenAI 改变与微软的合作伙伴关系，限制收入分成支付

items.title_zh: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能初创公司 Manus

items.desc_zh: 在此之前，中国监管机构对与 Facebook 所有者达成的交易进行了数月的审查。

items.title_zh: 斯里兰卡僧侣在行李中发现110公斤大麻后被捕

items.title_zh: 随着威胁级别的增加，海盗在索马里海岸扣押了另一艘船只

items.title_en: Kim Jong Un opens memorial for N Korean soldiers killed in Ukraine war
items.title_zh: 金正恩为在乌克兰战争中丧生的朝鲜士兵开设纪念碑
items.desc_en: Kim Jong Un and Russian Defence Minister Andrey Belousov unveiled the memorial in Pyongyang.
items.desc_zh: 金正恩和俄罗斯国防部长安德烈·别洛乌索夫在平壤为纪念碑揭幕。

items.title_en: French teen who licked vending machine straw faces jail in Singapore
items.title_zh: 法国青少年舔自动售货机吸管在新加坡面临牢狱之灾
items.desc_en: The teen, who posted on social media a video of himself licking the straw, could be jailed for more than two years.
items.desc_zh: 这名青少年在社交媒体上发布了自己舔吸管的视频，可能会被判处两年以上监禁。

items.title_en: Human remains found in search for missing University of South Florida doctoral student - CBS News
items.title_zh: 寻找失踪的南佛罗里达大学博士生时发现人体遗骸 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻
items.desc_en: Human remains found in search for missing University of South Florida doctoral student  CBS NewsProsecutors say suspect gave shifting accounts in Florida doctoral student killing case  CNNHuman Remain
items.desc_zh: 在寻找失踪的南佛罗里达大学博士生过程中发现人体遗骸 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻检察官称，嫌疑人在佛罗里达州博士生杀人案中提供了转移账户 CNN《人体遗骸》

items.title_en: Missing 5-year-old girl likely abducted from Outback home, police say
items.title_zh: 警方称失踪的5岁女孩可能是在内陆地区的家中被绑架的
items.desc_en: Police are searching for a man recently released from prison over her disappearance.
items.desc_zh: 警方正在寻找一名因她失踪而最近从监狱释放的男子。

items.title_en: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
items.title_zh: “反觉醒”科技老板与 NHS 和国防合同的病毒宣言
items.desc_en: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.
items.desc_zh: 这家与英国政府签订合同、备受争议的科技公司的老板发表了一份关于西方未来的 22 点计划。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板对没有告诉警方大规模枪击嫌疑人的账户深感抱歉
items.desc_en: Sam Altman on Thursday wrote a brief letter of apology to the people of Tumbler Ridge, Canada in the wake of a January mass shooting.
items.desc_zh: 周四，山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 在一月份发生大规模枪击事件后，向加拿大塔布勒岭 (Tumbler Ridge) 的人民写了一封简短的道歉信。

items.title_en: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
items.title_zh: 英国网络负责人表示，是时候放弃密码而改用万能钥匙了——万能钥匙是什么？
items.desc_en: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.
items.desc_zh: 长期以来，密码一直是我们保护在线帐户安全的默认方式，但 NCSC 表示，密钥是更好的选择。

items.title_en: UK biobank data incident caused by 'a few bad apples', boss says
items.title_zh: 老板称英国生物银行数据事件是由“一些坏苹果”引起的
items.desc_en: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.
items.desc_zh: 教授罗里·柯林斯爵士表示，作为银行的老板和参与者，他对这一事件感到“愤怒”和“不安”。

items.desc_zh: 在印度，丝绸生产是一个日益高科技的行业。

items.title_en: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
items.title_zh: 白宫备忘录称中国公司大规模盗窃人工智能
items.desc_en: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.
items.desc_zh: Michael Kratsios 的一份备忘录称，主要是中国的公司错误地借鉴了美国的人工智能模型。

items.title_en: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows
items.title_zh: Meta 表示，随着人工智能支出的增长，它将裁员 8,000 人
items.desc_en: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.
items.desc_zh: 此次裁员是员工数周以来一直期待的，这将是 Meta 自 2023 年以来最大规模的裁员。

items.title_en: UK Biobank health data listed for sale in China, government confirms
items.title_zh: 政府确认英国生物银行健康数据在中国出售
items.desc_en: The government said medical data of 500,000 people was affected but no personally identifiable information had been made available.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，50 万人的医疗数据受到影响，但尚未提供任何个人身份信息。

items.title_en: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access
items.title_zh: Xbox 降低 Game Pass 价格，但结束《使命召唤》第一天的访问
items.desc_en: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.
items.desc_zh: 微软表示，新的《使命召唤》游戏将在发布“大约一年”后添加到订阅服务中。

items.title_en: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
items.title_zh: 英国游戏偶像 Peter Molyneux 谈人工智能、他的最终创作和不断变化的行业
items.desc_en: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.
items.desc_zh: 《神鬼寓言》等标志性系列游戏的创作者表示，《阿尔比恩大师》将是他制作的最后一款游戏。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。
